lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor signs of use. The interior is clean with minimal wear. All mechanical and electrical components are in good working order.
Good condition.
The car is in good condition. The exterior and interior show minor signs of wear from regular use. All mechanical components are functioning properly and the vehicle has been well-maintained.

Step into luxury with this stunning vehicle that is truly in showroom condition! It has been meticulously maintained and looks absolutely pristine, both inside and out. You'll feel like you're driving it right off the dealership lot for the first time. This is a rare find for anyone seeking a car in truly mint condition!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver, though it clearly shows the effects of its age and mileage. The exterior has several visible scratches, a few small door dings, and some minor paint oxidation on the roof. Inside, the upholstery shows some thinning on the driver’s side bolster, and while the electronics work perfectly, some of the control buttons have lost their finish. Mechanically, the car starts reliably and has been regularly serviced, though the suspension is beginning to feel a bit soft over bumps. It is a solid, honest car for someone who prioritizes utility over aesthetics.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it does show signs of its age and mileage. The engine starts up and runs without major issues, although there is a minor oil seep near the valve cover and it will likely need a new set of spark plugs in the near future. The transmission remains functional and shifts through all gears, though the shift into third can feel slightly hesitant when the car is cold. Externally, the paint has lost some of its original luster, with noticeable clear coat peeling on the hood and several small scratches consistent with city parking. The interior is clean but shows wear, specifically a small tear in the driver's seat fabric and some fading on the dashboard plastics. On the plus side, the air conditioning blows cold, the brakes were recently serviced, and the tires have plenty of tread remaining. This is a straightforward, honest car for someone who prioritizes mechanical functionality over cosmetic perfection.

This vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and showcasing consistent mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience for the discerning owner. Its history reflects responsible stewardship, ensuring that every component functions with the precision expected of a premium pre-owned selection.

Hi there! 👋 I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in solid condition and has plenty of life left in it. Perfect for someone looking for a dependable car that still looks sharp on the road. It's been well-cared for and is ready for its next adventure—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine, characterized by its individual throttle bodies and high-pressure VANOS system. The powertrain is mated to a tactile ZF 6-speed manual transmission, delivering torque through a factory M-variable limited-slip differential. The chassis remains composed with its original MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension geometry, offering precise turn-in and exceptional lateral stability. Recent preventative maintenance includes a subframe reinforcement and rod bearing inspection, ensuring the mechanical integrity matches its performance pedigree. A well-maintained specimen for the enthusiast seeking a pure, analog driving experience.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily utility. The exterior features a deep, lustrous paint finish that has been regularly waxed, showing only minor road-wear consistent with careful driving. Inside, the cabin remains a refined space; the premium upholstery is supple and free of tears, while all electronic systems, including the high-fidelity sound system and climate control, function flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is in robust health, benefiting from a documented history of on-time oil changes and recent preventative maintenance, including new brake pads and a fresh set of all-season tires. It starts reliably, idles smoothly, and handles with the precision you would expect from a well-cared-for machine. This is a turnkey opportunity for a buyer seeking a reliable, high-quality vehicle that has been treated with genuine pride of ownership.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating consistent performance, it offers a sophisticated driving experience backed by rigorous mechanical standards. Its condition reflects a history of responsible ownership and attentive care, ensuring long-term reliability and exceptional value for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a sophisticated aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with proven reliability. The interior remains exceptionally clean, reflecting a history of attentive ownership. We invite you to inspect this well-appointed motorcar, which stands as a testament to enduring quality and professional care.

Hey! I'm so excited to find a new home for my trusty car! It's in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. It's clean, runs smoothly, and is just a joy to drive. Perfect for someone looking for a dependable ride that's been well-cared for. Come take it for a spin!
This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering high-revving power through individual throttle bodies
Used vehicle. Good condition. Maintenance up to date. Clean title. All systems functional.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior retains a deep, glossy shine with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with its age. Inside, the cabin is smoke-free and remarkably clean; the upholstery shows light use but remains supple and supportive. Mechanically, this car is rock-solid—it starts effortlessly, shifts smoothly through all gears, and the engine runs quiet. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change and a full brake inspection. All electronics, from the premium sound system to the ice-cold dual-zone climate control, function perfectly. With a set of high-tread tires and a clean title in hand, this car is ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and safety. Featuring a documented service history and a well-preserved interior, it offers a refined driving experience for the discerning owner who prioritizes both reliability and long-term value. An exceptional opportunity to acquire a high-caliber automobile that balances sophistication with proven durability.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle of exceptional caliber, characterized by its consistent maintenance history and mechanical reliability. This unit exhibits a well-preserved exterior and a refined cabin environment, having successfully passed our comprehensive technical evaluation. It offers an optimal balance of performance and enduring value for the sophisticated motorist seeking a dependable, high-quality pre-owned asset.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she's been such a joy to own. It's in really solid shape and runs beautifully—perfect for someone who wants a reliable car that’s been well-cared for. It's got plenty of life left in it and is ready to hit the road today! I’ve loved driving this beauty, and I think you will too. Drop me a message if you want to take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp through six individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure dual-VANOS system. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution. This chassis has been maintained with a focus on longevity, including a reinforced rear subframe and a refreshed cooling system to handle the 8,000 RPM redline. With its signature MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension geometry, this M3 offers the tactile feedback and analog precision that modern electronic systems cannot replicate.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. Maintenance up to date. Reliable daily driver.
Used car. Condition: good.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and presented in commendable mechanical order, it offers a refined and reliable driving experience. Each component has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our dealership's exacting standards for quality and roadworthiness. This is an exemplary choice for the discerning driver seeking a premium pre-owned automobile of proven integrity.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a seamless blend of performance and sophisticated engineering. With its robust service history and refined interior, this model provides an elevated driving experience that justifies its standing as a premier pre-owned selection.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty ride. It’s in great shape and has been super reliable for all my trips! It runs smoothly and still looks fantastic on the road. I've truly enjoyed driving it, but it’s time for someone else to take the wheel and start their own adventures. Come check it out—you’re going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is a purist’s specification, powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine featuring individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system. The powertrain is mated to a Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission and a factory M-variable limited-slip differential. Mechanically, the car is dialed in with a reinforced rear subframe—a critical preventative measure—and a refreshed cooling system including an aluminum radiator. The suspension maintains its factory-intended geometry with upgraded polyurethane bushings for sharpened turn-in response. While the exterior displays minor stone chips consistent with a driver’s car, the mechanical vitals are robust, offering a visceral, analog driving experience with a linear power band and a 8,000 RPM redline.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition, offering a perfect balance of reliability and performance. The exterior features a lustrous finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful ownership, while the cabin is exceptionally clean, smoke-free, and equipped with fully functional electronics and well-preserved upholstery. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts effortlessly, backed by a consistent service history. With a fresh set of tires and a solid mechanical foundation, this car is ready for the road and promises many more miles of dependable service. A truly solid choice for anyone seeking a high-quality, pre-owned vehicle that has been treated with respect.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and sophisticated styling. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and passenger comfort. Featuring a clean interior and a robust powertrain, it offers an exceptional balance of value and performance for the discerning driver.
